label: kilodash panel
info: Serves the kilodash Node-RED screen. GET /kilodash/state returns 6 field labels+values and 6 button labels; POST /kilodash/btn/:n fires a trigger. Feedback values come from flow context f1..f6 (labels f1_label..f6_label). See setup/NODE-RED.md.
